digest.greeting: Jean, today stayed centered on portfolio alignment, PM capacity, Send Letters, and Phase 2 resource clarity. Dashboard state did not show any taskId-based checklist completions, but Outlook did show you sharing the PMs Workshop file with Jhara, Mar, and Yuri. The remaining carry-forward list is still substantial, with the urgent KPI, Incident Response, and Supabase items still needing clear closure.

items.label: Shared PMs Workshop materials
items.detail: Outlook shows Jean shared the "PMs Workshop" file at 4:12 PM AST with Jhara Ochoa, Mar Garcia, and Yuri Almeida, creating a same-day artifact for the PM capability/workshop workstream.

items.label: Confirm KPI final approval
items.detail: Still unchecked in dashboard state. Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling; confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close only after approval is confirmed.

items.label: Clarify Incident Response priority path
items.detail: Still unchecked and urgent from the base digest. Confirm leadership clarity on the Incident Response priority path and whether the intake manager should be the next owner or alignment point.

items.label: Check Supabase security warning
items.detail: Still unchecked and urgent. Review the critical table-publicly-accessible/RLS-disabled warning and decide whether the project is still active and needs remediation.

items.label: Close CoE guide and priority follow-ups
items.detail: Still unchecked. Follow up with the remaining Team Leads on their CoE Brief Guide review, then align CoE priorities and upcoming work with Jorge's portfolio/capacity context.

items.label: Complete Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Still unchecked from the base digest. Complete Nadia Wilson's request on affected project areas for the EPMO, using the Salesforce Program Overview as supporting context.

items.label: Review Rippling and Asana overdue tasks
items.detail: Still unchecked, and Outlook again showed a Rippling overdue-task notice today for the harassment prevention training due December 9, 2025. Review Rippling and Asana and close anything stale or complete.

items.label: Close Project Coordinator decision loop
items.detail: Still unchecked. Use the Project Coordinators Debriefing context and the carried-over Rippling feedback request to finish candidate feedback and confirm the recruiting decision path.

items.label: Review Staff Aug PRD and Send Letters queue impacts
items.detail: Still unchecked. Andrea's Staff Aug PRD input still needs a response or integration path, and today's Send Letters Queue kickoff context should be folded into the queue/process follow-up.

items.label: Monitor DACA/I-90 remaining IT work
items.detail: Still unchecked. DACA RNWL and I-90 RNWL remain on hold per prior dashboard context, but request #0027951 and remaining IT/UAT items still need monitoring until confirmed complete or formally paused.

items.label: Resolve Phase 2 ownership, SMS resource, and tool-support follow-ups
items.detail: Still unchecked and refreshed by today's Outlook thread. Jorge asked Jean to reach out to Jessica Kim and Paige Calvert, or Amy Loesch while Paige is OOO, about Legal/Marketing resources for Phase 2 SMS; keep that with the Phase 2 dashboard ownership, OneDrive/SharePoint, Venn, and sync-coverage follow-ups.

items.label: Phase 2 SMS resource ownership needs Legal and Marketing leaders
items.detail: In today's Outlook thread, Jill Coen clarified that she does not lead Marketing or Legal and cannot allocate those resources. Jorge then asked Jean to reach out to Jessica Kim and Paige Calvert, or Amy Loesch while Paige is OOO, to identify project contacts and accelerate scripts for the next sprint.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint plus DP Guidance
items.detail: The base digest and Outlook show both TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint and DP Guidance in the 9:30 AM window. Yuri accepted the TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint today, so confirm which meeting needs live attendance or coverage.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with David. Useful for CoE, PM capability, dashboard/tool-support, and open Phase 2 follow-ups.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected focus window before the afternoon EPMO stack.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Operational updates, lessons learned, celebrations, and team topics. Good place to surface recurring blocker themes if they remain open.

items.label: Cybersecurity Awareness and CoE Biweekly Touchpoint overlap
items.detail: Outlook shows May Cybersecurity Awareness at 3:00 PM, weekly-meeting preparation focus time in the same window, and CoE Biweekly Touchpoint at 4:00 PM. Confirm which items need live attention.
